headline: Cummins CEO joins 3M board of directors
summary: The OEM executive was also appointed to the board’s science, technology and sustainability committee.

headline: How Is Expeditors International's Stock Performance Compared to Other Transportation Stocks?
summary: Expeditors International has outperformed its industry peers recently, yet analysts remain cautious about the stock’s prospects.
